_**Agent (auto-low)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I understand the task. I will rewrite shareable_thought for each specified note file.

The shareable_thought lines must be four distinct angles: definition, move, boundary, and payoff. They must not copy the description or key_concept. Contractions are forbidden in frontmatter. Plain words are required. emotional-regulation.md likely still needs fixing because its current lines copy the description and key_concept. blameless-after-action-review.md also copies those sections verbatim.

Drafted four unique shareable_thought angles for blameless-after-action-review.md: timing, culture rule, ownership, and outcome. Now starting grace.md.

Drafted four unique shareable_thought angles for grace.md: gift versus wages, mercy paired with guilt, a report-card week not revoking grace, and belief deciding forever while good deeds thank the gift. Starting judge-not.md next.

Drafted four unique shareable_thought angles for judge-not.md: fix my own plank first, Jesus still names fruit, I am not the final judge, and calling out sin is not playing God. Now starting peace.md.

Drafted the remaining angles for peace.md: 2am scrolling is not peace fruit, peacemaking means fixing things rather than choosing sides, and peacemakers move toward hard conversations instead of borrowing tomorrow’s trouble.

Started self-control.md with an urge-versus-choice angle: close the app before the snarky reply sends, because the urge should not pick send.

Completed self-control.md with three more angles: hero-ball versus the scripted pass, spirit-grown self-control versus white-knuckle restraint, and deliberate next moves over streak badges. Started emotional-regulation.md with a kitchen-walk angle, because heat must not get to mail the first draft.

Completed emotional-regulation.md with three more angles: a cashier keeping her voice level after a snap, labeling a spike out loud before it becomes a thread, and one unchecked reply becoming a week of unplanned damage control.

Started childlike-faith.md with two angles: water at practice without a merit calculation is the posture God wants at prayer, and delaying prayer until the week looks respectable is contractor faith, not child faith.

Finished childlike-faith.md with two more angles: Jesus ended the worthiness negotiation at the door, and the beginner posture is the same in the garden and in the kingdom.

Started plain-commitments-at-work.md with four angles: a Friday yes in the meeting must stay a Friday yes, definitely maybe trains people to distrust every deadline, hype on a weak promise signals broken follow-through, and whiteboard minutes tracked beats parent-group guessing about equal playing time.

Drafted four angles for title-without-influence.md: a supervisor badge without followership, weekly syncs that no one prepares for, pulling rank because of a title while trust sits elsewhere, and servant moves turning borrowed authority into granted influence. Started incident-investigation.md with a parking-lot fender-bump angle: trace blind corners and signage, not only which driver.

Finished incident-investigation.md with three more angles: tracing prep timing and station layout even when a server is blamed, keeping the file open on system causes until the hazard is redesigned, and closing the investigation on a runbook fix rather than a warning email.

Started heed-every-near-miss.md with two angles: stopping the activity after a swimmer is rescued during the same drill, and fixing the toddler setup before the third near-miss.

Finished heed-every-near-miss.md with two more angles: the organization relaxes when nobody has been hurt, and luck blocking the worst outcome is a data point, not proof the setup is safe.

Started free-tier-hosting-stack.md with three angles: twelve client sites on one free account can burn five hundred builds before the month ends, pinning Hugo versions on every project matters because one unpinned failure still counts against the cap, and static bandwidth is unmetered while queues and fat repos are where free tiers bite.

Finished free-tier-hosting-stack.md with a fourth angle: no database means scope honesty upfront, not a surprise when a cart is needed.

Drafted four angles for outcomes-over-pitch-decks.md: ask two parents who finished about injuries and consistency, ask two neighbors who lived through a remodel about permit fights, downstream turnover and delivery stress tell you more than slide charisma ever will, and do not sell your favorite hammer when the fruit requires WordPress or Shopify.

Started own-the-error.md.

Finished own-the-error.md with four angles: naming the wrong attachment in the thread before anyone else sees it, calling the bad pass out loud in the huddle so the next play trusts faster, blaming theater versus naming the miss so the team can learn, and repairing what broke today while fixing the process that let it through tomorrow.

Started god-centered-design.md with an angle about a youth event cutting the performance block for small groups and Scripture when photos mattered more than prayer.

Finished god-centered-design.md with three more angles: a notes garden chasing traffic over clarity asks whether the brand or Christ comes first, a calendar built for applause still feels empty on Monday morning, and kingdom-first filters the week while neighbor-love keeps God-centered from becoming selfish spirituality.

Started eliminate-before-managing.md with three angles: a stable step stool beats three warning stickers on a wobbly ladder, cleaners moved up high beat a do-not-touch lecture every time a toddler opens the cabinet, and safeguards still need a human to read the sign every single time.

Finished eliminate-before-managing.md with a fourth angle: open-water endurance drills versus pool 
</details></think>
